0.1.0.note: Online serving benchmark + trace collection (--torch-profiler-dir/--mark-trace) and per-kernel/per-layer analysis in tools/.

0.1.0.area: Configuration: config classes / CLI arguments / env vars
0.1.0.note: Config classes + CLI args + env vars. docs/configuration_guide.md is authoritative; arg parsing lives in the entrypoints/config (verify path).

0.1.0.area: Distributed: TP/DP/EP, MORI all-to-all, Two-Batch Overlap (TBO)
0.1.0.note: TP/DP/EP with MORI all-to-all. TBO splits a batch into two micro-batches to overlap expert-parallel comms with compute (DeepSeek-style). docs/distributed_guide.md is authoritative.

0.1.0.area: Engine / scheduler / KV cache / block allocation / prefix caching
0.1.0.note: Batch scheduling, block allocation, xxhash64-based prefix caching. nano-vllm-style engine under atom/engine/ (verify); the guide is authoritative.
OpenAI-compatible server + /start_profile,/stop_profile. Also atom/examples/simple_inference.py for offline.
All ATOM_* variables are documented in docs/environment_variables.md (authoritative). AITER/ROCm env (e.g. HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES, NCCL/RCCL) also apply.
ATOM's core value: AITER (ASM/CK/Triton) kernels wrapped as linear/attention/MoE/norm ops. docs/model_ops_guide.md is authoritative.

0.1.0.area: Model runner / forward / piecewise torch.compile / CUDA graphs
0.1.0.note: 4 piecewise torch.compile levels with CUDA graph capture; default opt level 3. docs/compilation_cudagraph_guide.md is authoritative.

0.1.0.area: Models / add an architecture / weight loading
0.1.0.note: One file per architecture under atom/models/ (verify). Auto-detects HF architecture. Supported: Llama, Qwen3(/MoE/Next), DeepSeek V2/V3, Mixtral, GLM-4/5/5.2, GPT-OSS, Kimi-K2, MiMo-V2.

0.1.0.area: Prefill/Decode (P/D) disaggregation / Mooncake / MORI-IO KV transfer
0.1.0.note: Prefill and decode on separate GPU nodes with RDMA KV transfer (MORI-IO; Mooncake push-mode). See PD disaggregation guide / recipes (verify exact paths).

0.1.0.area: Quantization (FP8 / MXFP4 / INT8 / INT4 / online quant)
0.1.0.note: FP8/MXFP4/INT8/INT4 auto-detected from HF config; online re-quant to PTPC-FP8/MXFP4 at load via --online_quant_config. Quant kernels via AITER (see model-ops-aiter).
Ready-made per-model deployment recipes (DeepSeek-R1, Qwen3-235B, Qwen3-Next, Kimi-K2, GLM-5, GPT-OSS-120B, TBO, PD). Start here to serve a specific model.
Multi-Token Prediction with an EAGLE proposer. Enable via --method mtp --num-speculative-tokens N. Spec module under atom/ (verify).
Tests under tests/; CI in .github/. Accuracy via lm-eval against the OpenAI endpoint (gsm8k, etc.).
